message:
feat(fec,harness): replace XOR parity with RFC 6330 RaptorQ InactivationDecoder and expand harness modules

FEC (db_fec.rs):
- Replace the simplified XOR-based single-fault page reconstruction
  with a full RFC 6330 RaptorQ InactivationDecoder that can recover
  multiple missing source pages from any combination of intact source
  symbols and repair symbols, provided at least K total symbols are
  available.
- Wire up source_equation() and repair_equation() for proper matrix
  construction, submit all available symbols via solve(), and extract
  recovered page data from the decoded intermediate symbols.
- Add deterministic seed derivation via derive_db_fec_repair_seed()
  for reproducible codec behavior across runs.

Harness:
- Expand forensics_navigator.rs with structured forensic analysis
  capabilities for corruption investigation workflows.
- Add lane_selector.rs implementing intelligent test lane selection
  based on failure history, coverage gaps, and priority weighting.
- Add toolchain_determinism.rs for verifying deterministic behavior
  across different Rust toolchain versions and compilation flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
